inputs.label: Lift Coefficient (CL)
inputs.businessContext: Non-dimensional lift coefficient of the aerodynamic body.

businessContext_i18n.en: Non-dimensional lift coefficient of the aerodynamic body.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de portance sans dimension du corps aérodynamique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de sustentación adimensional del cuerpo aerodinámico.

inputs.label: Drag Coefficient (CD)
inputs.businessContext: Non-dimensional drag coefficient of the aerodynamic body.

businessContext_i18n.en: Non-dimensional drag coefficient of the aerodynamic body.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de traînée sans dimension du corps aérodynamique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de arrastre adimensional del cuerpo aerodinámico.

inputs.label: Air Density
inputs.businessContext: Air density at current altitude and temperature (ISA sea level standard).

businessContext_i18n.en: Air density at current altitude and temperature (ISA sea level standard).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut irtifa ve sıcaklıkta hava yoğunluğu (ISA deniz seviyesi standardı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Luftdichte in aktueller Höhe und Temperatur (ISA-Meeresniveau-Standard).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité de l'air à l'altitude et à la température actuelles (norme ISA au niveau de la mer).
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del aire a la altitud y temperatura actuales (estándar ISA a nivel del mar).

inputs.label: Velocity
inputs.businessContext: Relative airspeed of the body through the fluid.

businessContext_i18n.en: Relative airspeed of the body through the fluid.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cismin akışkana göre bağıl hava hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Relative Fluggeschwindigkeit des Körpers durch das Fluid.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse relative du corps dans le fluide.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad aerodinámica relativa del cuerpo a través del fluido.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface de référence caractéristique (par exemple, surface alaire).
businessContext_i18n.es: Área en planta característica (p. ej., área alar).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
